input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.9.2.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.9.2.5
            TITLE: batteries or battery packs based on lithium chemistry must meet one of the two:

            CONTENT:
            rule T.9.2.5: Batteries or battery packs based on lithium chemistry must meet one of the two:
T.9.2.5 Batteries or battery packs based on lithium chemistry must meet one of the two:  
a. Have a rigid, sturdy casing made from Nonflammable Material  
b. A commercially available battery designed as an OEM style replacement

final_answer: Batteries or battery packs based on lithium chemistry must meet one of the two: T.9.2.5 Batteries or battery packs based on lithium chemistry must meet one of the two: a. Have a rigid, sturdy casing made from Nonflammable Material b. A commercially available battery designed as an OEM style replacement
